classification.cautionReason: No major mainstream heresy warning is attached by the preview classifier.

ccel.title: NPNF1-03. On the Holy Trinity; Doctrinal Treatises; Moral Treatises

title: Section 5

source.title: NPNF1-03. On the Holy Trinity; Doctrinal Treatises; Moral Treatises

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: But you will say, the good will of a friend towards me, although I cannot see it, yet can I trace it out by many proofs; but you, what things you will us to believe not being seen, you have no proofs whereby to show them.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: In the mean time it is no slight thing, that you confess that by reason of the clearness of certain proofs, some things, even such as are not seen, ought to be believed: for even thus it is agreed, that not all things which are not seen, are not to be believed; and that saying, “that we ought not to believe things which we see not,” falls to the ground, cast away, and refuted.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: But they are much deceived, who think that we believe in Christ without any proofs concerning Christ.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: For what are there clearer proofs than those things, which we now see to have been foretold and fulfilled?

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: Wherefore do ye, who think that there are no proofs why ye ought to believe concerning Christ those things which ye have not seen, give heed to what things ye see.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: The Church herself addresses you out of the mouth of a mother’s love: “I, whom ye view with wonder throughout the whole world, bearing fruit and increasing, was not once such as ye now behold me.”

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: But, “In thy Seed shall all nations be blessed.”

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: When God blessed Abraham, He gave the promise of me; for throughout all nations in the blessing of Christ am I shed abroad.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: That Christ is the Seed of Abraham, the order of successive generations bears witness.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: Shortly to sum up which, Abraham begat Isaac, Isaac begat Jacob, Jacob begat twelve sons, of whom sprung the people Israel.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: For Jacob himself was called Israel.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: Among these twelve sons he begat Judah, whence the Jews have their name, of whom was born the Virgin Mary, who bore Christ.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: And, lo, in Christ, that is, in the seed of Abraham, that all the nations are blessed, ye see and are amazed: and do ye still fear to believe in Him, in Whom ye ought rather to have feared not to believe?

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: What? doubt ye, or refuse ye to believe, the travail of a Virgin, whereas ye ought rather to believe that it was fitting that so God should be born Man.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: For this also receive ye to have been foretold by the Prophet; “Behold, a Virgin shall conceive in the womb, and shall bring forth a Son, and they shall call His Name Emmanuel, which is, being interpreted, God with us.”

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: Ye will not therefore doubt of a Virgin bringing forth, if ye be willing to believe of a God being born; leaving not the governance of the world, and coming unto men in the flesh; unto His Mother bringing fruitfulness, not taking away maidenhood.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: For thus behoved it that He should be born as Man, albeit He was ever God, by which birth He might become a God unto us.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: Hence again the Prophet says concerning Him, “Thy Throne, O God, is for ever and ever; a sceptre of right, the sceptre of Thy Kingdom.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: Thou hast loved righteousness, and hated iniquity; therefore God, Thy God, hath anointed Thee with the oil of gladness above Thy fellows.”

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: This anointing is spiritual, wherewith God anointed God, the Father, that is, the Son: whence called from the “Chrism,” that is, from the anointing, we know Him as Christ.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: I am the Church, concerning whom it is said unto Him in the same Psalm, and what was future foretold as already done; “There stood at Thy right hand the Queen, in a vesture of gold, in raiment of divers colors;” that is, in the mystery of wisdom, “adorned with divers tongues.”

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: There it said unto me, “Hearken, O daughter, and see, and incline thine ear, and forget thy own people and thy father’s house: for the King hath desired thy beauty: seeing that He is the Lord thy God: and the daughters of Tyre shall worship Him with gifts, thy face shall all the rich of the people entreat.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: All the glory of that King’s daughter is within, in fringes of gold, with raiment of divers colors.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: There shall be brought unto the King the maidens after her; her companions shall be brought unto Thee.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: They shall be brought with joy and gladness, they shall be brought into the Temple of the King.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: Instead of thy fathers, there are born unto thee sons, thou shall set them as princes over the whole earth.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: They shall be mindful of thy name, even from generation to generation.

verses.book: Concerning Faith of Things Not Seen.
verses.text: Therefore shall the people confess unto thee for ever, and for ever and ever.
